heading: Today
text: A few breaks of morning sun, then mostly cloudy, breezy, and mild.  Showers or a thunderstorm developing in NY, spreading east into western VT, with a rising chance east in the afternoon.  Highs in the 70s to near 80.  Winds becoming south 10 to 15 mph, gusting 30 to 40 mph from the Green Mountains west, and 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph east.

heading: Tonight
text: Occasional showers, possibly a thunderstorm.  Lows in the upper 50s to mid 60s.  Winds south 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph, diminishing late.

heading: Wednesday
text: Clouds breaking for increasing periods of sun.  Mild, and a bit muggy.  Some localized showers or a thunderstorm, more numerous east, tapering off.  Highs in the 70s, near 70 over the higher terrain north.  Winds south to southwest near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph, shifting to the west late.
